summary: iOS 🟥 FLAMINGO 🦩 Unable to update Charge Case
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app shows "can't be updated" message with no update button for Voyager Legend 50 Charge Case on outdated firmware in Device Settings > Software screen
description_clean: When a Poly Voyager Legend 50 Charge Case is on outdated firmware, the Device Settings > Software screen in the Poly Studio Mobile app shows a message saying "This product can't be updated in HP Poly Studio Mobile. Use HP Poly Studio Desktop to update this product." There is no button to update the Charge Case firmware. Expected behavior: Users should be able to update the Legend 50 Charge Case firmware directly via the mobile app.
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. From the Home screen, tap on the connected Poly Voyager Legend 50 device.
4. Tap on the Software option under Device Settings.
5. Observe the message displayed on the Software screen.
expected: The Software screen should display an option or button to update the Legend 50 Charge Case firmware directly within the Poly Studio Mobile app.
actual: The Software screen shows the message: \"This product can't be updated in HP Poly Studio Mobile. Use HP Poly Studio Desktop to update this product.\" There is no button or option to update the Charge Case firmware.
